---
title: "CV"
toc: true
---

## Education

- **PhD in Computer Science**, Georgia State University, 2020–present
  TReNDS Center (GSU, Georgia Tech, Emory). Advisor: Prof. Vince D. Calhoun

- **MS in Computer Science**, University of Georgia, 2017–2020

- **BS in Management**, Shandong University of Science and Technology, 2013–2017

## Research Trajectory

**2020–2024: Multimodal Neuroimaging Engineering**

Developed deep learning frameworks for brain imaging — vision transformers, GANs, and diffusion models for fusing structural MRI with functional connectivity. Published in *NeuroImage*, *Human Brain Mapping*, *Journal of Neuroscience Methods*, and multiple IEEE venues (ISBI, EMBC).

**2025–present: Transition to Theory-Driven Cross-Disciplinary Research**

Pivoted from engineering-driven model stacking to a theory-first program rooted in **statistical physics** and **nonequilibrium thermodynamics**. Current work develops exact mathematical foundations for hidden-variable detectability, spectral methods in structural biology, and the physics of learning.

Core research directions:

- **Information geometry of hidden variables** — Quartic detection law on statistical manifolds: exact KL projection geometry, tangent-normal decomposition, semiparametric efficiency bounds (Amari, BKRW, Le Cam). Proves that coarse-grained refitting absorbs $O(\lambda^2)$ perturbations, leaving only $O(\lambda^4)$ normal residuals.
- **Stochastic thermodynamics from partial observations** — Cross-spectral certification of entropy production under the Lucente impossibility. Pairing principle for minimum probe count. Connection to Mori-Zwanzig projection and thermodynamic uncertainty relations (Seifert, Barato-Seifert).
- **Spectral graph theory for structural biology** — Graph Laplacian spectra, heat-kernel traces, participation-ratio effective rank. Applied to RNA 3D quality assessment (SpecRNA-QA) and protein ensemble coherence (SCI).
- **Financial physics** — Volatility-conditioned correlation dynamics in S&P 500, timescale separation in market microstructure. Spectral dark regimes in financial time series.
- **Physics of AI** — Grokking as a finite-size phase transition. Kurtosis contrast laws in mixture separation.

## Selected Publications

See full list on the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

- **Bi Y**, Calhoun VD. Cross spectra break the single-channel impossibility. Under review, *Physical Review Letters*.
- **Bi Y**, Calhoun VD. Why single probes cannot detect hidden forcing: A quartic detection law. Under review, *Physical Review Letters*.
- **Bi Y**, Zhang C, Calhoun VD. Timescale coalescence makes hidden persistent forcing spectrally dark. Under review, *Physical Review E*.
- **Bi Y**, Abrol A, Jia S, Sui J, Calhoun VD. Gray matters: ViT-GAN framework for identifying schizophrenia biomarkers. *NeuroImage*, 2024.
- **Bi Y**, Abrol A, Fu Z, Calhoun VD. A multimodal vision transformer for interpretable fusion of functional and structural neuroimaging data. *Human Brain Mapping*, 2024.

## Certifications

- **CFA Level III**, CFA Institute

## Skills

- **Mathematics/Physics**: Information geometry, stochastic processes, spectral graph theory, nonequilibrium thermodynamics, KL divergence & projection, semiparametric theory
- **Programming**: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, MATLAB, R, Mathematica
- **Neuroimaging**: fMRI, sMRI, functional network connectivity analysis
- **Languages**: Chinese (native), English (professional)

## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yclnpogAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/yudabitrends)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yudabi/)
